name: RebarComplexGeometry
summary: The ReinforcingBar class represents a single physical reinforcing bar. It contains the curves and bendings that define the geometry of the bar.

properties.name: BendingRadiuses
properties.summary: The bending radiuses of the wire.

properties.name: Diameter
properties.summary: Gets the diameter of the wire.

properties.name: Legs
properties.summary: Gets the list of RebarLegs of the bar.
